calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property And Confirming Trustee Should Treat Property As Community Property
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for Sunantha Wong (Surviving Settlor/Trustee).

Ms. Espey stated that Grace Ng does not have heirs that are unknown to this family, that everybody has gotten notice and that there is no opposition. Mr. Espey also stated that the family all agrees who owns what and that the title does not reflect that. In addition, Ms. Espey spoke of deeds that were transferred in and out, the possibility of doing probate for Grace, stated that a Quiet Title action is expensive, and that the deed is clear as to sole ownership and intent. The Court expressed concern stating this in a way is a short cut. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Property, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.
